frontend: Vite React TypeScript with Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui Radix primitives, Motion for React, and Phosphor icons
storage: IndexedDB return-visit receipts plus shared receipt URL payloads; Stellar testnet remains the public proof surface
real_data_source: Stellar testnet transaction state plus Groth16 proof artifacts and public receipt payloads

real_data_sources.name: Stellar testnet transaction state
real_data_sources.evidence: src/services/stellar.ts submits manageData transactions and links Stellar Expert testnet tx references.

real_data_sources.name: Public receipt state
real_data_sources.kind: IndexedDB return state plus URL-encoded public receipt payload
real_data_sources.evidence: src/services/receiptStore.ts persists receiptId, walletAddress, nullifier, status, proof, and tx reference, and encodes public receipt fields for second-context replay.

deploy.last_smoke: .hunter/public-smoke.report.json pass=true; desktop/mobile accepted receipts and second-context receipt reopen passed on the public URL.
deploy.binding_decision: No Cloudflare storage binding required; static Pages plus browser IndexedDB and shared receipt URL payloads.

wallet_path: Claimant connects Freighter or a client-side Stellar signer, signs the claim transaction, waits for proof and Stellar transaction/contract confirmation, then receives a GrantDrop receipt with tx or contract-state reference.
no_wallet_exception: Read-only receipt replay and public inspection do not require a wallet; successful claiming is not allowed without wallet/client signing.
demo_signer_policy: A testnet-only client signer may be offered as a clearly labeled fallback for judges without Freighter, but normal P0 path remains wallet/client signer -> sign -> transaction/proof.

sponsor_technology.name: Stellar testnet
sponsor_technology.reviewer_visible_use: Accepted claims submit a signed Stellar testnet transaction before the receipt can show accepted.
sponsor_technology.proof: src/services/stellar.ts and receipt Stellar Expert tx URL.

sponsor_technology.name: Stellar account signer
sponsor_technology.reviewer_visible_use: The claimant must use a signer before proof and transaction submission.

sponsor_technology.name: ZK nullifier
sponsor_technology.reviewer_visible_use: Duplicate claims are blocked by the same public nullifier while the private secret stays off the receipt.

product_backbone.storage_schema: browser receipts plus shared receipt payload

user_case_beats.user_action: select private input and claim grant
user_case_beats.evidence: proof state, tx reference, stored receipt, and shared receipt URL
shared receipt URL plus Stellar reference

delivery_mode_reason: A 2-3 minute live-pitch-style demo video can show the claim path, duplicate block, and receipt inspection without needing a longer combined narrative film.
why_this_stack: The hero loop is a public web claim booth with wallet signing, proof generation, receipt persistence, and testnet inspection; Vite/Cloudflare keeps deployment small while preserving real state.
